headline: Insider Alert? A Trump Iran Announcement Got Front-Ran By 'Well-Timed' Oil Bets
summary: Kalshi flagged 400+ suspicious trades this year, more than double 2025, as Reuters reports well-timed oil bets preceded Trump's Iran announcement.

headline: NYSE Content Update: Lynn Martin Calls for AI Coordination as U.S. Business Representative in Shanghai
summary: The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) provides a daily pre-market update directly from the NYSE Trading Floor. Access today's NYSE Pre-market update for market insights before trading begins.

headline: How Recent Developments Are Reframing The Story For Intercontinental Exchange (ICE)
summary: Intercontinental Exchange’s updated fair value price target has been nudged from US$198.80 to US$200.67, a roughly 1% move that reflects a fine tuning rather than a reset. That aligns with recent analyst commentary where several firms lifted targets and one cut theirs, giving you a mixed but generally constructive read on how expectations around upside and execution are shifting. Ahead, you will see how these changing targets, alongside the latest research, can help you track the evolving...

headline: NYSE President Lynn Martin Joins U.S. Presidential Delegation for Historic Trump-Xi China Summit in Beijing
summary: BEIJING & SHANGHAI, May 15, 2026--The New York Stock Exchange, part of Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE: ICE), one of the world's leading providers of financial market technology and data powering global capital markets, today announced that NYSE Group President Lynn Martin joined the delegation of U.S. business leaders participating in President Trump’s historic state visit with Chinese President Xi Jinping.
